summary: Verified all 8 new landing page components are correctly integrated and rendering on the HomePage. All components use dark theme (#050505 bg, #111111 cards) and Space Grotesk font. Interactive components (VehicleConfigurator, DealQuiz, BeforeAfterSlider) work correctly. No console errors.
passed_tests: RealtimeCounter: All 4 animated stat cards render (Deals heute analysiert, Aktive Fahrzeuge im Index, ECUs in der Datenbank, Ersparnis gefunden)
IntegrationShowcase: Scrolling integration logos render (mobile.de, AutoScout24, DAT, Schwacke, etc.)
ParallaxDataWall: All 6 stat cards render (ECUs analysiert, Ersparnis gefunden, Abdeckungsrate, Analyse-Zeit, Regionen abgedeckt, Echtzeit-Monitoring)
DealQuiz: Component renders with data-testid='deal-quiz', 3-question flow works, result displays deal count

VehicleConfigurator: Component renders with data-testid='vehicle-configurator', brand selection (BMW, Audi, Mercedes, VW, Porsche) works, model selection works, price displays correctly (€29.800 for BMW 320d Touring)
BeforeAfterSlider: Vorher/Nachher comparison renders with range slider, slider is interactive
CompetitorRadar: SVG radar chart renders with legend comparing AutoIntel vs Manuelle Suche, category labels visible (Geschwindigkeit, Genauigkeit, etc.)
MarketHeatmap: SVG Germany map renders with deal hotspots (München, Berlin, Hamburg, etc.), city labels and deal counts visible
Dark theme maintained: Body background rgb(5,5,5) = #050505
Space Grotesk font used for headings
Page loads without console errors (only minor external script warning)
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 components properly imported in App.js (lines 17-24)
All 8 components correctly placed in HomePage render order (lines 49-89)
Components use Framer Motion useInView hooks for scroll-triggered animations
data-testid attributes present on DealQuiz and VehicleConfigurator for testing
All component data is hardcoded (no API calls needed)
seed_data_creation: N/A - All data hardcoded in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 8 new landing page components are now integrated and working: 1) RealtimeCounter - 4 animated stat cards, 2) IntegrationShowcase - scrolling partner logos, 3) ParallaxDataWall - 6 stat cards with parallax effect, 4) DealQuiz - 3-question interactive quiz, 5) VehicleConfigurator - brand/model selection with price display, 6) BeforeAfterSlider - comparison slider, 7) CompetitorRadar - SVG radar chart, 8) MarketHeatmap - Germany map with deal hotspots. Page order: Hero → IntegrationShowcase → LiveTicker → RealtimeCounter → FeaturesMarket → MarketHeatmap → ParallaxDataWall → ROICalculator → VehicleConfigurator → DealQuiz → FeaturesTuning → ECUVisualizer → AIDealAnalyzer → BeforeAfterSlider → CompetitorRadar → HowItWorks → Pricing → Testimonials → FAQ → Footer
